root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.seq_no, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.sqter_status, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.sqter_share, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.sqter_div, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.sqter_aver, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.sqter_other, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.begin_date, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.end_date, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.department, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.number_of_case, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.plaintiff, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.defendant, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.condition, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.remark, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.address_desc, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.prename_group, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.court ,sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.deed_status FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_membership_sequester, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.membership_no ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.money_type_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.sqter_status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_sequester.begin_date
